title: Fitness and Wellness Coordinators
description: Manage or coordinate fitness and wellness programs and services. Manage and train staff of wellness specialists, health educators, or fitness instructors.

tasks.text: Maintain wellness- and fitness-related schedules, records, or reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop or coordinate fitness and wellness programs or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend or approve new program or service offerings to promote wellness and fitness, produce revenues, or minimize costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage or oversee fitness or recreation facilities, ensuring safe and clean facilities and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise fitness or wellness specialists, such as fitness instructors, nutritionists, or health educators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Track attendance, participation, or performance data related to wellness events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or facilitate training sessions or seminars for wellness and fitness staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain or arrange for maintenance of fitness equipment or facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or implement budgets and strategic, operational, purchasing, or maintenance plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate fitness and wellness programs to determine their effectiveness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop fitness or wellness classes, such as yoga, aerobics, strength training, or aquatics, ensuring a diversity of class offerings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Demonstrate proper operation of fitness equipment, such as resistance machines, cardio machines, free weights, or fitness assessment devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct needs assessments or surveys to determine interest in, or satisfaction with, wellness and fitness programs, events, or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Teach fitness classes to improve strength, flexibility, cardiovascular conditioning, or general fitness of participants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop marketing campaigns to promote a healthy lifestyle or participation in fitness or wellness programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select or supervise contractors, such as event hosts or health, fitness, and wellness practitioners.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Track cost-containment strategies and programs to evaluate effectiveness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide individual support or counseling in general wellness or nutrition.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use computer skills and software to manage Web sites or databases, publish newsletters, or provide webinars.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to customer, public, or media requests for information about wellness programs or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and oversee fitness or wellness programs, such as information presentations, blood drives, or training in first aid or cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR).
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and oversee events such as organized runs or walks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and oversee health screenings or other preventive measures, such as mammography, blood pressure, or cholesterol screenings or flu vaccinations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret insurance data or Health Reimbursement Account (HRA) data to develop programs that address specific needs of target populations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
